_comment: Hand-maintained EAM Role Catalog. Reconciled permission-by-permission against docs/Research/eam-classification-agent-grounding.md (see docs/Research/eam-catalog-reconciliation.md). This file is the maintained source until the classification agent lands; the PowerShell generator is retired.

roles.description: Manage profile photos of users and people settings for all users in the organization.
roles.note: Configures the People service and profile data sources, not identity or access control. Plane corrected to Management; the service-config write makes it Specialized.

roles.description: Read and edit data from Microsoft 365 when accessing from the Microsoft Purview portal.
roles.note: The role definition carries no allowedResourceActions in inventory, so plane and level follow its documented function (Purview workload content writer).

roles.description: Can create and manage the authentication methods policy, tenant-wide MFA settings, password protection policy, and verifiable credentials.
Can create and manage all aspects of Microsoft Search settings.
Trigger a password submit event for custom authentication.
Manage and configure Microsoft Viva Glint settings in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
Can create and manage the attribute schema available to all user flows.
roles.displayName: External ID User Flow Attribute Administrator
roles.note: Writes the attribute schema used by external-identity user flows, an identity-configuration write, so Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Read everything in the Teams admin center, but not update anything.
Default role for guest users. Can read a limited set of directory information.
Create new Microsoft Entra or Azure AD B2C tenants.
Can provision and manage all aspects of Cloud PCs.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Cloud PCs makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Can create and manage all aspects of Microsoft Dynamics 365, PowerApps and Microsoft Flow.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Power Platform environments and their data makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Can read tenant governance relationships and relevant objects.
Create and manage all aspects warranty claims and entitlements for Microsoft manufactured hardware, like Surface and HoloLens.
Can create and manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps except App Proxy.
Back up and restore content across supported services (SharePoint, OneDrive, and Exchange Online) in Microsoft 365 Backup
Can read and manage compliance configuration and reports in Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft 365.
Can read security information and reports, and manage configuration in Microsoft Entra ID and Office 365.
Manage all capabilities in the Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance service.
roles.note: Writes cross-tenant access policy, which controls external access into the tenant. That authorization write makes it Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of SharePoint Embedded containers.
Read the definition of custom security attributes.
Read all aspects of Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI-related enterprise services in Microsoft 365.
roles.note: Read-only data role, but Microsoft flags it isPrivileged, so the floor forces Privileged.

roles.description: Customize sign in and sign up experiences for users by creating and managing custom authentication extensions.
Access the analytical capabilities in Microsoft Viva Insights and run custom queries.
View product feedback, survey results, and reports to find training and communication opportunities.
roles.note: Reads adoption and usage telemetry and service health. It serves data rather than controlling identity, so the plane is Data, not Control.

roles.description: Create and read warranty claims for Microsoft manufactured hardware, like Surface and HoloLens.
Can manage all aspects of the Exchange product.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all mailbox content makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Restricted role for guest users. Can read a limited set of directory information.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
roles.note: Writes device objects (microsoft.directory/devices), which is workload management, not read-only data. Plane corrected to Management and level to Specialized.

roles.description: Can manage Office apps cloud services, including policy and settings management, and manage the ability to select, unselect and publish 'what's new' feature content to end-user's devices.
Provision new IoT devices, manage their lifecycle, configure certificates, and manage device templates.
Manage external collaboration policies and settings for Teams, including configuring external domains and controlling which groups and users can interact with the organization.
Can create or update Exchange Online recipients within the Exchange Online organization.
Can view and share dashboards and insights via the M365 Insights app.
Can create and manage all aspects of Windows Update deployments through the Windows Update for Business deployment service.
Can access and manage Desktop management tools and services.
Can manage all aspects of the Intune product.
Can perform management related tasks on Teams certified devices.
roles.note: The directory actions in inventory are read-only, but the role administers Teams-certified devices in the Teams admin center, so it stays Management/Specialized.

roles.description: Can create and manage trust framework policies in the Identity Experience Framework (IEF).
Manage or purge data from Microsoft 365 when accessing from the Microsoft Purview portal.
roles.note: The role definition carries no allowedResourceActions in inventory, so plane and level follow its documented function (Purview workload content admin).

roles.description: Manage all aspects of Microsoft Edge.
Read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes for an application.
roles.note: Read-only, but isPrivileged: it reads provisioning configuration on service principals, so the floor forces Privileged.

roles.description: Can manage all aspects of the Dynamics 365 product.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Dynamics 365 CRM and ERP data makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Manage access using Microsoft Entra ID for identity governance scenarios.
Back up and restore content (including granular restore) for Exchange in Microsoft 365 Backup
Can read sign-in and audit reports.
Do not use - not intended for general use.
roles.note: Microsoft-internal 'do not use' role. Any tenant assignment is a finding regardless of plane or level.

roles.description: Can manage product licenses on users and groups.
Write, publish, manage, and review the organizational messages for end-users through Microsoft product surfaces.
roles.note: Authors organizational messages broadcast to end users. This administers a messaging feature, not identity or access, so the plane is Management.

roles.description: Assign custom security attribute keys and values to supported Microsoft Entra objects.
Create and manage all aspects of workflows and tasks associated with Lifecycle Workflows in Microsoft Entra ID.
Read audit logs and configure diagnostic settings for events related to custom security attributes.
Can approve Microsoft support requests to access customer organizational data.
Can read security information and reports in Microsoft Entra ID and Office 365.
roles.note: Read-only, but isPrivileged: it sees detection and policy gaps across Entra and M365, so the floor holds it at Privileged.

roles.description: Creates and manages security events.
Can manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft services that use Microsoft Entra identities.
Can manage all aspects of printers and printer connectors.
Can manage the Microsoft Teams service.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Teams content and configuration makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of the Agent Registry service in Microsoft Entra ID
roles.note: Full administration of the agent registry, which governs agent identities, is a Control-plane write, so Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Can create and manage all aspects of user flows.
Can reset passwords for non-administrators and Helpdesk Administrators.
roles.note: Microsoft flags it isPrivileged (it can reset credentials and read BitLocker keys), so the floor sets Privileged even though SPA prose lists help desk as Specialized.

roles.description: Has access to topic management dashboard and can manage content.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over the organization's knowledge network and topics makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Can manage all aspects of the Azure Information Protection product.
Can manage settings for Microsoft Kaizala.
Can see only tenant level aggregates in Microsoft 365 Usage Analytics and Productivity Score.
Can manage all aspects of the Skype for Business product.
Limited access to manage devices in Microsoft Entra ID.
Manage all aspects of the Microsoft Places service.
Can read messages and updates for their organization in Office 365 Message Center only.
Can access to view, set and reset authentication method information for any user (admin or non-admin).
Manage all aspects of the Yammer service.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over the entire Viva Engage (Yammer) network makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Can manage domain names in cloud and on-premises.
Define and manage the definition of custom security attributes.
roles.note: Defines custom security attribute sets and definitions, the schema behind attribute-based access. That security-configuration write makes it Specialized, not Enterprise.

roles.description: Provides designated security personnel with read-only access to network traffic logs in Microsoft Entra Internet Access and Microsoft Entra Private Access for detailed analysis.
Can manage all settings for Microsoft Viva Pulse app.
Can create and manage the editorial content such as bookmarks, Q and As, locations, floorplan.
Can read basic directory information. Commonly used to grant directory read access to applications and guests.
Can manage all aspects of the Cloud App Security product.
Can manage Active Directory to Microsoft Entra cloud provisioning, Microsoft Entra Connect, and federation settings.
Perform all migration functionality to migrate content to Microsoft 365 using Migration Manager.
Manage and configure all aspects of Microsoft Viva Goals.
Manage all aspects of organizational branding in a tenant.
Can read and write basic directory information. For granting access to applications, not intended for users.
Can invite guest users independent of the 'members can invite guests' setting.
Access and perform all administrative tasks on Dynamics 365 Business Central environments.
Can reset passwords for non-administrators and Password Administrators.
Manage all aspects of SharePoint Advanced Management.
Can create and manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Can create attack payloads that an administrator can initiate later.
Read audit logs related to custom security attributes.
Back up and restore content (including granular restore) for SharePoint and OneDrive in Microsoft 365 Backup
Set up and manage the ingestion of organizational data into Microsoft 365.
Users assigned to this role are added to the local administrators group on Microsoft Entra joined devices.
roles.displayName: Azure AD Joined Device Local Administrator
roles.note: Grants local administrator rights on Azure AD joined devices. The directory permissions are minimal, but the device-admin effect keeps it Management/Specialized.

roles.description: Default role for member users. Can read all and write a limited set of directory information.
Only used by Microsoft Entra Connect Sync Account.
roles.note: Service-account-only role used by Entra Connect sync. No human should hold it; any human member is a finding.

roles.description: Manages all aspects of Microsoft Fabric.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Microsoft Fabric and Power BI content makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Manage voice and telephony features and troubleshoot communication issues within the Microsoft Teams service.
Can manage secrets for federation and encryption in the Identity Experience Framework (IEF).
Can read security messages and updates in Office 365 Message Center only.
Create and manage all aspects of Global Secure Internet Access and Microsoft Global Secure Private Access, including managing access to public and private endpoints.
roles.note: Writes conditional access and cross-tenant access policy as part of Global Secure Access. Touching authorization moves it to the Control plane even though it administers a network service.

roles.description: Create an agent identity blueprint and its agent identity blueprint principal in a tenant. User will be added as an owner of the created agent identity blueprint and its agent identity blueprint principal.
roles.note: Creates agent identity blueprints and service principals and owns them. Writing identity principals is a Control-plane action with real blast radius, so Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of Entra Permissions Management.
roles.note: Administers Microsoft Entra Permissions Management (CIEM), which governs entitlements across clouds. That access-governance scope makes it Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Can perform common billing related tasks like updating payment information.
Can manage Conditional Access capabilities.
Can configure knowledge, learning, and other intelligent features.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over the organization's knowledge network and topics makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as create recovery jobs and manage backup snapshots.
Can initiate governance relationships and terminate them.
Can manage calling and meetings features within the Microsoft Teams service.
Can configure identity providers for use in direct federation.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Can create and manage all aspects of attack simulation campaigns.
Can access to view, set and reset authentication method information for any non-admin user.
Can create application registrations independent of the 'Users can register applications' setting.
Manage all aspects of Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI-related enterprise services in Microsoft 365.
Only used by Microsoft Entra Connect service.
roles.note: Service-account-only role used by Entra Connect. No human should hold it; any human member is a finding.

roles.description: Can approve customer lockbox requests for accessing customer data in Entra ID.
Can manage network locations and review enterprise network design insights for Microsoft 365 Software as a Service applications.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Manage all aspects of agents in a tenant including identity lifecycle operations for agent blueprints, agent identity blueprint principals, agent identities, and agentic users.
Manage all aspects of external user profiles in the extended directory for Teams.
roles.note: Creates and updates external user profiles, a directory identity-object write, so Specialized rather than Enterprise.

roles.description: Do not use - not intended for general use.
roles.note: Microsoft-internal 'do not use' role. Any tenant assignment is a finding regardless of plane or level.

roles.description: Read data from Microsoft 365 when accessing from the Microsoft Purview portal.
roles.note: The role definition carries no allowedResourceActions in inventory, so plane and level follow its documented function (Purview workload content reader).

roles.description: Can read all tenant governance data.
Manage and share Virtual Visits information and metrics from admin centers or the Virtual Visits app.
Can manage Azure DevOps organization policy and settings.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all Azure DevOps organizations and source code makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Review, approve, or reject new organizational messages for delivery in the Microsoft 365 admin center before they are sent to users.
roles.note: Approves organizational messages shown to end users. This administers a messaging feature, not identity or access, so the plane is Management; approval-only keeps it Enterprise.

roles.description: Creates and manages compliance content.
Can manage role assignments in Microsoft Entra ID, and all aspects of Privileged Identity Management.
Can register and unregister printers and update printer status.
Manage all aspects of the Microsoft Dragon admin center.
Has administrative access in the Microsoft 365 Insights app.
Read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes for an application.
Manage aspects of Microsoft Graph Data Connect service in a tenant.
Can read service health information and manage support tickets.
Can manage all aspects of the SharePoint service.
roles.note: Not flagged isPrivileged, but full data-plane control over all SharePoint site and OneDrive content makes a compromise catastrophic, so the blast-radius escalation raises it to Privileged.

roles.description: Can read everything that a Global Administrator can, but not update anything.
roles.note: Read-only, but Microsoft flags it isPrivileged: full visibility into the security and identity configuration is a tactical advantage, so the floor holds it at Privileged.

roles.description: Read all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as list all preview jobs, recovery jobs, backup snapshots, and create preview jobs.
Can troubleshoot communications issues within Teams using advanced tools.
Manage all aspects of granular delegated admin privileges (GDAP) relationships in a customer tenant.
roles.note: Manages delegated admin privileges that grant external partners administrative access into the tenant. Controlling who can administer is elevated, so Specialized.

roles.description: Can troubleshoot communications issues within Teams using basic tools.
Members of this role can create/manage groups, create/manage groups settings like naming and expiration policies, and view groups activity and audit reports.
Can manage all aspects of users and groups, including resetting passwords for limited admins.
Read custom security attribute keys and values for supported Microsoft Entra objects.
